<!-- indicator: fig-resp-qol-rc -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-resp-qol-rc
#| fig-cap: 'Respondents'' Ratings of Quality of Life in Rockand County'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Respondents'' Ratings of Quality of Life in Rockand County.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-resp-qol-rc", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
